title: The haves and have nots of the AI gold rush
summary: The AI boom is creating disparities in wealth and opportunity, with mixed sentiment even among tech professionals about the industry's current direction and sustainability.
content: The vibes around the current AI boom aren't great, even in the tech industry.

zh.title: AI淘金热中的赢家与输家
zh.summary: AI繁荣正在加剧财富和机会的差异，即使在科技专业人士中也存在对该行业当前发展方向和可持续性的矛盾态度。

title: Marketing operating system Nectar Social raises $30M Series A led by Menlo
summary: Nectar Social, an AI-powered marketing platform, secured $30 million in Series A funding led by Menlo Ventures' Anthology Fund, which was created in partnership with Anthropic.
content: AI-powered marketing platform Nectar Social announced Thursday that it raised a $30 million Series A round led by Menlo Ventures and its Anthology Fund, which was created alongside Anthropic.

zh.title: 营销操作系统Nectar Social完成3000万美元A轮融资
zh.summary: AI驱动的营销平台Nectar Social获得由Menlo Ventures旗下Anthology基金领投的3000万美元A轮融资，该基金由Menlo与Anthropic合作创建。

title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
summary: ArXiv is cracking down on misuse of large language models in scientific research by implementing year-long author bans for papers where AI performs all the work.
content: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.

zh.title: 研究库ArXiv将对完全由AI完成工作的作者实施一年禁令
zh.summary: ArXiv正在加强对科学研究中大型语言模型滥用的打击力度，对于让AI执行全部工作的论文，实施一年的作者禁令措施。

title: Snap, YouTube, and TikTok settle suit over harm to students
summary: Snap, YouTube, and TikTok have settled the first major lawsuit filed by a Kentucky school district alleging social media addiction harmed student learning and mental health. Meta still faces trial in similar cases, with over 1,000 comparable lawsuits pending nationwide.
content:
Schools say social media is hurting grades and creating a mental health crisis. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge	

Snap, YouTube, and TikTok have settled the first lawsuit of its kind, alleging that social media addiction has cost public schools massive amounts of money, according to Bloomberg. The suit, filed by the Breathitt County School District in Kentucky, claims that social media has disrupted learning and created a mental health crisis, straining budgets. The terms of the settlement have not been revealed yet, and Meta is still facing a trial in the same suit, which is viewed as a bellwether for over 1,000 similar lawsuits across the country
This follows an earlier case, settled by Snap and TikTok, in which a 19-year-old plaintiff claimed signif …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Snap、YouTube和TikTok就对学生造成伤害的诉讼达成和解
zh.summary: Snap、YouTube和TikTok已就肯塔基州一个学区提出的首起重大诉讼达成和解，该诉讼声称社交媒体成瘾对学生学习和心理健康造成伤害。Meta仍面临类似案件的审判，全国还有1000多起类似诉讼待决。

title: The offline desk gadget that actually got me to sit up straight
summary: Deep Care's $350 offline device provides real-time posture and movement guidance without internet connectivity. The privacy-first approach appeals to users seeking health tracking alternatives that don't rely on cloud services.
content: Deep Care's $350 device is pricy, but it runs offline and helps you improve your posture and movement habits

zh.title: 这个离线桌面工具真的让我坐直了
zh.summary: Deep Care的350美元离线设备在无互联网连接的情况下提供实时姿态和运动指导。隐私优先的方法吸引了寻求不依赖云服务的健康追踪替代方案的用户。

title: Sony tries to explain that its AI Camera Assistant doesn’t suck
summary: Sony clarified its AI Camera Assistant feature for the Xperia 1 XIII, which suggests photo improvements through exposure, color, and blur adjustments rather than editing original images. The feature drew criticism after Sony's promotional examples conflated zoom suggestions with camera angle recommendations.
content:
The variety of terrible is impressive.	

After Sony drew some unwanted attention for a post demonstrating its AI Camera Assistant on the Xperia 1 XIII, it's trying to clarify how the feature works. The company says it doesn't edit photos, but makes suggestions based on lighting, depth, and subject. Point the camera at something, and it will give you four options for changing exposure, color, and background blur. 
In its product video, Sony says that the AI Camera Assistant will also suggest "the most photogenic angle." Though the clip only shows it suggesting that someone zoom in, which is not the same as suggesting a camera angle. 

The examples that Sony posted on X, while bette …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼试图解释其AI相机助手并不差
zh.summary: 索尼澄清了Xperia 1 XIII的AI相机助手功能，该功能通过曝光、色彩和模糊调整建议改进照片，而不是编辑原始图像。在索尼的宣传示例将缩放建议与相机角度建议混淆后，该功能引发了批评。

title: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman takes charge of product strategy
summary: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman is taking charge of product strategy as the company plans to merge ChatGPT with its Codex programming product. The move signals a strategic shift toward unifying OpenAI's consumer and developer-focused offerings.
content: OpenAI's latest shakeup comes as the company reportedly plans to combine ChatGPT and its programming product Codex.

zh.title: OpenAI联合创始人格雷格·布罗克曼接管产品战略
zh.summary: OpenAI联合创始人格雷格·布罗克曼正在接管产品战略，该公司计划将ChatGPT与Codex编程产品合并。此举标志着战略转变，旨在统一OpenAI的消费者和开发者产品。

title: $60B AI chip darling Cerebras almost died early on, burning $8M a month
summary: Cerebras Systems, valued at $60B after 2026's largest tech IPO, nearly collapsed during early development while spending $8 million monthly on an AI chip many considered impossible. The company's persistence through years of financial burn ultimately proved prescient as AI chip demand surged.
content: Cerebras Systems was 2026's biggest tech IPO so far. But years ago, it burned through hundreds of millions working on a chip many believed impossible.

zh.title: 价值600亿美元的AI芯片宠儿Cerebras早期几乎夭折，每月烧钱800万美元
zh.summary: Cerebras Systems公司在2026年规模最大的科技IPO后估值600亿美元，但在开发早期因每月花费800万美元开发一款许多人认为不可能的AI芯片而几乎崩溃。该公司在多年财务消耗中的坚持最终被证明是先见之明，因为AI芯片需求激增。

title: NPR’s Manoush Zomorodi talks about living with too much tech
summary: NPR reporter and author Manoush Zomorodi is launching 'Body Electric,' examining how technology impacts physical health following her previous work on mental health effects. The project, developed with Columbia University Medical Center, addresses the broader health consequences of constant device usage.
content:
Manoush Zomorodi tackled tech’s effect on our brains, now she’s looking at our bodies. | Image: Tory WIlliams	

Manoush Zamorodi is an accomplished reporter, podcast host, and author. Her new book, Body Electric, takes a comprehensive look at how technology is impacting our physical health. It's a collaboration between NPR and Columbia University Medical Center that picks up where her first title, Bored and Brilliant, left off. That book looked at how technology was hampering our mental health. I highly recommend it to anyone who feels like being constantly attached to a device is sapping their energy and creativity. 
Both books grew out of her extensive podcasting work. After heading up WNYC's Note To Self, Zamorodi went on to host NPR's TED Radio H …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: NPR记者Manoush Zomorodi谈论与过多科技共存
zh.summary: NPR记者兼作家Manoush Zomorodi正在推出《身体电流》项目，在其之前关于心理健康影响的工作基础上，探讨科技如何影响身体健康。该项目由哥伦比亚大学医学中心开发，解决了持续设备使用对更广泛健康影响的问题。

title: Users turn to jailbreaking their older Kindles as Amazon ends support
summary: As Amazon ends support for older Kindle models, some users are exploring jailbreaking to continue adding books independently. While the practice offers a path forward for those unwilling to upgrade, it carries security and stability risks.
content: It may be possible to jailbreak an older, end-of-support Kindle and continue adding books to it. But doing so carries risks.

zh.title: 随着亚马逊停止支持，用户转向越狱旧Kindle设备
zh.summary: 随着亚马逊停止支持旧Kindle型号，一些用户正在探索越狱以继续独立添加书籍。虽然这种做法为那些不愿升级的人提供了前进之路，但它伴随着安全和稳定性风险。

title: Turtle Beach made a good SteelSeries headset clone that’s $50 less
summary: Turtle Beach's Stealth Pro 2 delivers comparable performance to SteelSeries's $399 Nova Pro Omni wireless headset at a $50 lower price point. Both include wireless hi-res audio support and improved microphone quality, making premium wireless audio increasingly competitive.
content:
Both of these headsets are stellar in different ways.	

I really liked the SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless, so the company didn't have to say much to get me excited about its successor. The $399 Nova Pro Omni that came out on May 5th has a similar design to the 2022 model, but with some new and improved features - support for wireless hi-res audio (24-bit / 96kHz audio over 2.4GHz), better mic quality, and compatibility with all consoles in every model, to name the big ones. All the $599 Nova Elite has on the Omni is better build materials and bigger drivers.
But things got interesting when, just a few weeks before the Omni was announced, Turtle Beach showed off its Stealth Pro 2. To say th …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Turtle Beach推出的SteelSeries耳机克隆版便宜50美元
zh.summary: Turtle Beach的Stealth Pro 2相比SteelSeries价格399美元的Nova Pro Omni无线耳机性能相当，但便宜50美元。两款耳机都支持无线高保真音频和改进的麦克风质量，使高端无线音频竞争日益激烈。

title: Here are 40 of our favorite deals from REI’s massive Anniversary Sale
summary: REI's annual Anniversary Sale, running through May 25th, discounts outdoor essentials including smartwatches, camping gear, and hiking equipment. REI members receive an additional 20 percent off with code ANNIV26, maximizing savings before the summer season.
content:
The last-gen InReach Mini 2 might require a subscription to use, but we guarantee it’s far more durable than your phone. | Image: Garmin	

REI’s annual Anniversary Sale — the retailer’s biggest of the year — has arrived, bringing with it discounts on all kinds of outdoor essentials. If you’ve got a camping trip coming up, now is a good time to stock up on the basics, whether it be a tent, sleeping pad, or stove. If your summer plans involve hiking or heading into the backcountry, there are also savings to be had on everything from Garmin watches to water filters, some of which are also on discount at retailers like Amazon.
The sale runs through May 25th, and to save you time scrolling, we’ve rounded up the best deals below. Additionally, as in previous years, REI members get 20 percent off one full-price item or one REI Outlet item with code ANNIV26, giving those who pay for a lifetime membership ($30) even more ways to save in the run-up to Memorial Day.







Smartwatches and fitness trackers
Garmin Fenix 8
The Garmin Fenix 8 is a premium multisport watch that features a speaker, mic, and on-device assistant for calls, timers, and voice commands. It also offers elite battery life, dual-frequency GPS, and robust sensors. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $999.99 $749.99 at Amazon (43mm)
 $1099.99 $849.99 at Walmart (51mm)
 $1099.99 $849.99 at REI (47mm)


Amazfit Active 2
The Amazfit Active 2 delivers outsized value for the price. It looks spiffy and has a wide array of health tracking features, plus built-in GPS and AI chatbots to provide extra context to your data. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $99.99 $89.99 at Best Buy
 $99.99 $84.99 at REI
 $99.99 $84.99 at Target

Garmin’s Venu 4 is geared toward the average athlete, and it’s on sale at REI, Amazon, and Best Buy in both size configurations for $499.99 ($50 off), matching its best price to date. The wearable offers many of the same health and fitness tracking features as its predecessor, the Venu 3S, inclu

zh.title: 以下是REI周年庆大促的40个最喜欢的优惠
zh.summary: REI的年度周年庆促销活动持续至5月25日，提供户外必需品的折扣，包括智能手表、露营装备和登山用具。REI会员使用代码ANNIV26可获得额外20%的折扣，在夏季前最大化储蓄。

title: Mixtape is a musical portrait of teenage life
summary: Mixtape is a video game that captures teenage life through music and coming-of-age themes, following Stacey Rockford over a summer day as she prepares to leave her California hometown for New York City. The game explores friendship, nostalgia, and adolescent angst backed by a curated soundtrack of classic hits.
content:
Playing Mixtape is like playing a video game version of a high school movie. Kids banter about the meaning of life and the theme songs that would play when they walk in a room. They're worried about looking cool at a big party. They're obsessed with finding booze. But under all of those tropes is a meaningful story about nostalgia, friendship, and teenage angst - and it's all backed by a great soundtrack packed with classic hits. 
Mixtape takes place over the course of a summer day. You play as Stacey Rockford, a music obsessive and recent high school graduate. Rockford is leaving her sleepy California suburb for New York City the next morn …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 混音带是青少年生活的音乐肖像
zh.summary: 《混音带》是一款电子游戏，通过音乐和成长主题捕捉青少年生活，跟随史黛西·洛克福德在夏日一天的经历，当她准备离开加州家乡前往纽约市时。游戏探索友谊、怀旧和青少年焦虑，配以精选的经典歌曲。

title: The app you need to clean up your computer
summary: This Installer column features editor recommendations for productivity tools and apps tested that week, including AI assistants, fitness trackers, and organizational software. The piece surveys various utilities designed to enhance daily digital life and computer productivity.
content:
Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 128, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, sorry this one's so Mac-heavy, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) 
This week, I've been reading about David Attenborough and screenwriters-turned-AI-trainers and the Subway Takes guy, listening to a lot of Productivity FM's mixes while I work, finally writing my vibe-coding opus, testing the Poppy AI assistant (and giving it more of my data than I frankly should have), tracking my pathetic step counts with the new Fitbit Air, buying more of The Atlantic's summer reading list t …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 您需要的清理计算机的应用
zh.summary: 这个"安装程序"栏目介绍了编辑推荐的生产力工具和本周测试的应用程序，包括人工智能助手、健身追踪器和组织软件。该文章调查了各种旨在增强日常数字生活和计算机生产力的实用工具。

title: These are the laptops I recommend for pretty much anyone
summary: The Verge's laptop buying guide recommends the Apple MacBook Air 15 with M5 chip as the best choice for most users, while covering alternatives for specific needs like gaming, video editing, and repairability. The guide includes detailed specs, pricing, and comparisons to help consumers make informed purchasing decisions.
content:
Need a new laptop? It’s a tough decision. If you’re like most people, a laptop is one of the most expensive tech purchases you’ll make, and it’s something you’ll use and live with nearly every day for years to come. So there’s a lot riding on this pricey expense.
I’ve tested all kinds of laptops, from cheap Windows computers and Chromebooks to bread-and-butter MacBooks and over-the-top gaming machines. These are the ones I recommend the most and why I think they might be a good fit for you.
Though the MacBook Air is still the easy recommendation for most people, that doesn’t make it the go-to answer for everyone. What if you need more power for video or photo editing, or for crunching large datasets? What if you prefer to run Windows? What if you play lots of games and want to take them with you? Or what if you want something that’s super repairable, or something that’s unusual? We’ve got some recommendations, including a Chromebook or two, a laptop with two screens, the 16-inch MacBook Pro, and the Microsoft Surface Laptop with a Snapdragon X Elite chip.
The best answer for most people
Apple MacBook Air 15 (2026, M5)


Score: 9

ProsCons


A little more speed never hurts
Starts with more storage that’s twice as fast
Still one of the best laptops around
Great battery life and speakers

Starting price is $100 more than M4 generation (though you get more storage for it)
The MacBook Neo now exists and costs less than half



Where to Buy:

 $1299 $1149 at Amazon
 $1299 at Apple
 $1299 at Best Buy

CPU: M5 (10-core) / GPU: M5 (8- or 10-core) / RAM: 16GB, 24GB, 32GB / Storage: 512GB, 1TB, 2TB, 4TB / Display: 13.6-inch or 15.3-inch Liquid Retina display, 2560 x 1664 or 2880 x 1864 , 60Hz, no touch option / Dimensions: 11.97 x 8.46 x 0.44 inches (13-inch) or 13.40 x 9.35 x 0.45 inches (15-inch) / Weight: 2.7 pounds (13-inch) or 3.3 pounds (15-inch)
Just get the latest MacBook Air. It’s been a little same-y for a few years, but it’s still the best for a reason. Every part o

zh.title: 这些是我推荐给几乎所有人的笔记本电脑
zh.summary: The Verge的笔记本电脑购买指南推荐采用M5芯片的Apple MacBook Air 15作为大多数用户的最佳选择，同时也涵盖了针对游戏、视频编辑和可维修性等特定需求的替代方案。该指南包括详细的规格、定价和比较，帮助消费者做出明智的购买决定。

title: The US is betting on AI to catch insider trading in prediction markets
summary: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission is deploying AI to detect and prevent insider trading in prediction markets. The regulatory effort demonstrates government commitment to using advanced analytics to maintain market integrity in emerging trading categories.
content: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission wants us to know it's taking this very seriously.

zh.title: 美国押注AI来查处预测市场中的内幕交易
zh.summary: 商品期货交易委员会正在部署AI来检测和防止预测市场中的内幕交易。这一监管举措表明政府致力于使用先进分析来维护新兴交易类别的市场诚信。
